summary: Resolved all findings from the delivery acceptance audit: added missing order lifecycle domain, hardened inventory row-locking, replaced heuristic KPI materialization with actual transactional data, extended at-rest encryption to wallet monetary fields, enforced bcrypt-only password hashing, added audit trail query endpoints, implemented automatic QR rotation, and fixed documentation inconsistencies.

details: Added Order and OrderLine models with status state machine: created → reserved → completed | cancelled.
Order reservation transactionally creates inventory reservations for each line; completion and cancellation release them.
Added RBAC-gated REST endpoints: POST /orders, /orders/reserve, /orders/complete, /orders/cancel, GET /orders, /orders/{ref}.
Added Alembic migration 20260403_0012 for orders and order_lines tables.

fixes.area: Inventory row-locking for transfer and count paths (High)
details: Added SELECT ... FOR UPDATE on inventory_ledger rows before reading position totals in post_transfer and post_count.
This serializes concurrent transfer/count operations on the same item/location, matching the existing reservation locking strategy.
Added PostgreSQL concurrent transfer locking test to verify only one of two simultaneous 4-unit transfers from a 5-unit source succeeds.
Removed synthetic _base_attempts formula and _store_from_order_reference heuristic string-parsing function.
KPI conversion/AOV now counts total_attempts from actual CouponRedemptionEvent rows and uses explicit store_id from each event.
Inventory turnover uses row.store_id directly instead of falling back to location_id.

fixes.area: At-rest encryption for wallet monetary fields (High)
details: Added _encrypt_amount and _decrypt_amount helpers in loyalty_service.py.
Wallet credit/debit operations now decrypt balance before arithmetic and write back the updated value.
Wallet ledger balance_after field uses decrypted balance.
Member view service handles encrypted wallet balance when building responses.
Changed bcrypt from conditional try/import to hard import — no PBKDF2 fallback in any environment.
assert_password_hashing_backend_ready is now a no-op (bcrypt availability is enforced at import time).
Updated existing auth tests that expected RuntimeError from the removed conditional logic.
Fixed frontend README paths from fullstack/ to repo/ (docker-compose.yml references).
Rewrote docs/design.md: removed 'partial' delivery declarations, updated topology paths, added order lifecycle and encryption coverage sections, and added a requirement traceability matrix.

fixes.area: Automatic QR token rotation in attendance UI (Medium)
details: Added Start/Stop Auto-Rotation button that fires rotateAttendanceQr every 30 seconds.
Added countdown timer showing seconds until current token expires.
Intervals and countdown are cleaned up on component unmount.

fixes.area: Audit trail query endpoints for loyalty/campaign/order (Medium)
details: Added /audit/events with optional resource_type and action prefix filters.
Added /audit/events/member for member/loyalty/wallet audit events with optional member_code filter.
Added /audit/events/campaign for campaign/coupon audit events.
Added /audit/events/order for order lifecycle audit events.
All endpoints are role-gated to administrator and store_manager.
Added refund_total and cost_total columns to kpi_daily_metrics via migration 20260403_0011.
Updated analytics _build_rows to read refund_total and cost_total from KPI metrics instead of hardcoding zeros.
gross_margin now computed as revenue - refunds - cost.

validation.backend_tests: docker compose --profile test run --rm -e REQUIRE_POSTGRES_LOCKING_TESTS=1 backend-tests => 79 passed
validation.frontend_tests: docker compose --profile test run --rm frontend-tests => 16 passed (6 test files)
validation.e2e_order_lifecycle: curl: create order -> reserve -> complete => all 200, audit events captured
